description:
Advances: specled.realized_by

Deliverable:
Add SpecLedEx.Validator.RealizedByDedupe (single source of truth for duplicate detection) at lib/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedupe.ex with duplicates(subject) returning [{tier_pair, entry}]. Trim entries before intersection. Add SpecLedEx.Validator.RealizedByDedupCheck.findings(index, severity \\ 'warning') at lib/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedup_check.ex emitting realized_by_redundant_dup with per-form message text (MFA-form vs bare-module-form). Wire into Mix.Tasks.Spec.Validate via with_validator_findings (or rename with_prose_findings to with_validator_findings).

Verification:
- Tests to pass: new test/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedup_check_test.exs covers the shared seam + finding shape + per-form message variants. Integration via mix spec.validate end-to-end with a crafted fixture spec containing a duplication.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: spec requirements specled.realized_by.redundant_dup_warning, dedup_check_shared_seam.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.dedup_realized_by.ex (S8)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/** (already shipped in S1-S5)
- .spec/**
Allowed touches:
- lib/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedupe.ex (new)
- lib/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedup_check.ex (new)
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.validate.ex (only to wire the new check)
- test/specled_ex/validator/realized_by_dedup_check_test.exs (new)
- test/specled_ex/mix/tasks/spec_validate_test.exs (only to add the integration test for the new code)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Severity hardcoded :warning; do NOT add config plumbing for the new code.
- Do NOT alter the existing prose check or other validator findings.
- Do NOT emit a finding from the future dedup task; findings flow through mix spec.validate only.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S7: Validator dedup check (RealizedByDedupe + RealizedByDedupCheck)
